mapper.select: SELECT id, name, email, phone, registered_at FROM members WHERE deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY registered_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE deleted_at IS NULL
SELECT id, name, email, phone, registered_at FROM members WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM members WHERE email = #{email} AND deleted_at IS NULL
AND id != #{excludeId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO members (name, email, phone) VALUES (#{name}, #{email}, #{phone})
mapper.update: UPDATE members SET deleted_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted_at IS NULL
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM loans WHERE member_id = #{memberId} AND returned_at IS NULL
